nasb.text: Though his sons are many, they are destined for the sword; And his descendants will not be satisfied with bread.

esv.text: If his children are multiplied, it is for the sword, and his descendants have not enough bread.

cnv.text: 即使他的兒女增多，還是被刀劍所殺， 他的子孫也必永不得飽食；

ccb.text: 他的儿女再多也难逃杀戮， 他的子孙永远吃不饱。
